coverages_discussed.notes: Per 2024 insurance history, the program includes policy numbers BWC-7853-4607, GL-0007119, CA-4481-4597, CP-9793-9090, CU00005026, and MT-0006135.

positives: No cancellations reported in prior insurance history from 2020 through 2024.
concerns: Claims counts were 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, and 10 in 2024.
Seven warehouse locations plus one service/repair facility and one office total approximately 735000 sq ft across nine locations in OH and PA.
